Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The root will likely be a StrictPartialOrder If DA and ACI are concurrent they can be nodes in the main PO with edges from CS to both and from both to the next step Putting them as nodes in the main PO is cleaner for linear flow visualization if the dependencies are simple
